formulas.name: Gain/Loss on Revaluation
formulas.formula: Gain/Loss on Revaluation = (Revalued Value of Assets - Original Value of Assets)
formulas.variables: Revalued Value of Assets, Original Value of Assets
formulas.notes: To be calculated for Revaluation Method when a partner is admitted

formulas.name: Gain/Loss on Revaluation (Partner's Share)
formulas.formula: Gain/Loss on Revaluation (Partner's Share) = Gain/Loss on Revaluation × Partner's Original Share
formulas.variables: Gain/Loss on Revaluation, Partner's Original Share
formulas.notes: To be calculated for Revaluation Method when a partner is admitted

formulas.name: Gain/Loss on Revaluation (New Partner's Share)
formulas.formula: Gain/Loss on Revaluation (New Partner's Share) = Gain/Loss on Revaluation × New Partner's Share
formulas.variables: Gain/Loss on Revaluation, New Partner's Share
formulas.notes: To be calculated for Revaluation Method when a partner is admitted

formulas.name: Adjustment towards New Partner's Capital
formulas.formula: Adjustment towards New Partner's Capital = Gain/Loss on Revaluation (New Partner's Share) + Partner's Share of Goodwill
formulas.variables: Gain/Loss on Revaluation (New Partner's Share), Partner's Share of Goodwill
formulas.notes: To be calculated when a partner is admitted

formulas.name: Partner's Share of Goodwill
formulas.formula: Partner's Share of Goodwill = (Original Partner's Capital × Original Partner's Share) / Total Capital
formulas.variables: Original Partner's Capital, Original Partner's Share, Total Capital
formulas.notes: To be calculated when a partner is admitted

formulas.name: New Partner's Share of Goodwill
formulas.formula: New Partner's Share of Goodwill = (Original Partner's Capital × Original Partner's Share) / Total Capital
formulas.variables: Original Partner's Capital, Original Partner's Share, Total Capital
formulas.notes: To be calculated when a partner is admitted

formulas.name: Adjustment towards Cash or Other Assets
formulas.formula: Adjustment towards Cash or Other Assets = Cash or Other Assets × Adjustment Rate
formulas.variables: Cash or Other Assets, Adjustment Rate
formulas.notes: To be calculated when a partner is admitted
